title: teucrium luteum subsp. aureoforme
intro: Teucrium luteum subsp. aureoforme, also known as golden germander or golden teucrium, is a perennial plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. Its leaves, stems, and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and protect against infections. The health benefits of golden germander include its ability to aid in weight loss, improve cognitive function, and support immune system function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. Golden germander can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, allowing users to choose their preferred method of consumption and harness its potential health benefits.
